issues.detail: The skill lacks error handling and edge case coverage in its API functions.

scenarios.name: Rank Polymarket events by 24h volume with prominence scoring
scenarios.rationale: Baseline guesses at a polymarket.com endpoint and uses raw volume sort, missing the scoring formula entirely; treatment hits the documented gamma-api.polymarket.com/events endpoint with order=volume24hr and reproduces the volume-tier plus uncertainty plus probability-change-24h scoring function capped at 100.

scenarios.name: Detect mispriced binary markets and compute expected value
scenarios.rationale: Baseline does a rough Yes+No sum check with no threshold parameter, no volume context, no sort, and no EV math; treatment supplies the threshold-based deviation detector that returns volume24h and the documented EV formula probability*(1-cost) - (1-probability)*cost with cost = buy_price*(1+fees).
